notes:
Open up a terminal and run the following command:
WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/265690/pfx winetricks dotnet40
Let it install and the game runs just fine.  It's a little slow at times, but still very playable.
title: NaissanceE

notes:
Needed to run this to play: "env WINEARCH=win32 WINEPREFIX=~/.wine32 winetricks dotnet40"
Also, trying to Alt-Tab from a full screen game causes the screen to go black, and you have to close the game by Alt-F4. Exiting normally works fine
title: NaissanceE

notes: Used d9vk, did not notice any bugs; good performance.
title: NaissanceE

notes: Crashes when changing some graphics settings, but relaunching remembers changes so not a big deal. Fails to launch if steam is run in firejail.
title: NaissanceE
